title: Intention
notes: Useful philosophical grounding for intention as commitment, planning, and action guidance.

title: Practical Reason
notes: Grounding for reasoning about what to do, not merely what is true.

title: Intention, Plans, and Practical Reason
notes: Book-length foundation for treating intention as durable commitment and plan governance.

title: Active Inference: The Free Energy Principle in Mind, Brain, and Behavior
notes: Reference book for active inference; do not store full copyrighted text in repo.

title: Autopoiesis and Cognition: The Realization of the Living
notes: Conceptual source for self-producing systems; use carefully as inspiration, not direct engineering proof.

title: Free Will
notes: Survey of the major positions on what it means for a will to be free; clarifies why yizhi's functional will need not settle the metaphysical free-will debate.

title: Action
notes: Grounding for the gap between mere bodily movement and genuine action done for reasons; relevant to action embedding and intention as commitment.

title: Embodied Cognition
notes: Entry point to enactivism and sense-making: cognition and value arise from a precarious, self-maintaining body coupled to its world, not from disembodied token processing.

title: Arthur Schopenhauer
notes: Schopenhauer's Wille: will as blind striving prior to representation. Historical root of treating will, not cognition, as primary; used as contrast and lineage, not as engineering model.

title: Friedrich Nietzsche
notes: Will to power as striving to grow and overcome, not merely to persist; relevant to yizhi's growth/reproduction ambition. Note the textual controversy around the posthumous 'Will to Power' compilation.

title: Mind in Life: Biology, Phenomenology, and the Sciences of Mind
notes: Evan Thompson's synthesis of the enactive life-mind continuity thesis: the same self-producing dynamics that keep an organism alive are the root of mind and concern. Inspiration, not engineering proof; do not store full copyrighted text in repo.

title: LangGraph Documentation
notes: Candidate workflow spine for stateful, durable, interruptible agent loops.

title: langchain-ai/langgraph
notes: GitHub snapshot checked 2026-06-21: MIT, ~35k stars, active. Reuse as orchestration substrate, not as WillState.

title: Letta Documentation
notes: Reference for stateful agents, core memory, archival memory, and agent-managed memory tools.

title: letta-ai/letta
notes: GitHub snapshot checked 2026-06-21: Apache-2.0, ~23k stars, active.

title: Mem0 Documentation
notes: Reference memory layer for AI agents; useful as adapter candidate after yizhi owns memory governance schema.

title: mem0ai/mem0
notes: GitHub snapshot checked 2026-06-21: Apache-2.0, ~58k stars, active.

title: getzep/graphiti
notes: Zep's temporal knowledge-graph memory engine: facts carry validity windows, hybrid semantic+BM25+graph retrieval. Per 2026-06 landscape scan: Apache-2.0, thousands of stars, active. Strong temporal pattern; lacks decay/salience.

title: OSU-NLP-Group/HippoRAG
notes: Reference implementation of hippocampal-indexing retrieval (KG + Personalized PageRank). Per 2026-06 landscape scan: MIT, a few thousand stars, less active. Useful retrieval signal, not a full memory lifecycle.

title: topoteretes/cognee
notes: Graph+vector memory with an Add -> Cognify -> Memify pipeline (Memify prunes stale nodes and reweights edges incrementally). Per 2026-06 landscape scan: Apache-2.0, active. Memify is a reusable graph-hygiene pattern; no explicit decay curve or salience.

title: OpenAI Agents SDK Documentation
notes: Useful provider/tool runtime reference; should remain an adapter boundary rather than yizhi's core cognition.

title: MineDojo/Voyager
notes: GitHub snapshot checked 2026-06-21: MIT, ~7k stars. Strong reference for automatic curriculum and skill library.

title: jennyzzt/dgm
notes: GitHub snapshot checked 2026-06-21: ~2k stars, active. Useful for sandboxed self-improvement patterns and risks.

title: caixd-220529/LifelongAgentBench
notes: Benchmark repo for evaluating skill accumulation and transfer over time.

title: Measuring AI Ability to Complete Long Tasks
notes: Reality check for long-horizon task reliability; informs bounded loops and checkpointing.

title: Specification gaming: the flip side of AI ingenuity
notes: Important safety pattern for autonomous value-loop metrics: avoid rewarding proxies that corrupt the goal.

title: Cursor
notes: Reference competitor boundary: Cursor is an IDE/coding workflow surface, not a general will engine.

title: Claude
notes: Reference competitor boundary: Claude is a model/chat/tool interface; yizhi should own persistent will state and value loops.

title: tmstack/awesome-persona-skills
notes: GitHub snapshot checked 2026-06-21: active persona-skill list with 女娲.skill references; useful as persona research context, not as Will Engine architecture.

title: alchaincyf/zhangxuefeng-skill
notes: GitHub snapshot checked 2026-06-21: high-visibility persona skill; illustrates demand and limitations of cognitive-operation-system packaging.

title: Panmax/awesome-nuwa
notes: Awesome list for 女娲.skill outputs; useful for tracking the persona-distillation ecosystem.

title: Being No One: The Self-Model Theory of Subjectivity
notes: Book-length self-model theory: there is no thing that is the self, only a transparent self-model the system builds. The license for yizhi to build (and maintain) an explicit self-model module. Precis PDF: https://journalpsyche.org/files/0xaad5.pdf

title: Oneself as Another
notes: Narrative identity in philosophy: selfhood is constituted through the story one tells binding past and future. Companion to McAdams & McLean 2013 for the self-cognition module.

title: Man's Search for Meaning
notes: The will-to-meaning: purpose is what survives when drives and goals are stripped away. The existential grounding for the vision module — why an agent needs a telos that outlasts any single goal.

title: The Way We Think: Conceptual Blending and the Mind's Hidden Complexities
notes: Book-length treatment of conceptual blending — combining mental spaces to produce emergent structure. The full account behind Fauconnier & Turner 1998 for the association module's recombination step.
